name: property managers handling 10-20 rental properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental properties, inefficient tracking of maintenance requests causes delayed repairs. We provide a streamlined service request management tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers handling 10-20 rental properties, inefficient tracking of maintenance requests causes delayed repairs. We provide a streamlined service request management tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails
